channel.title: Dmitry Vinnik — Articles & Videos
channel.description: Latest articles and videos by Dmitry Vinnik, Lead Developer Advocate. Covering open source, testing, mobile development, and developer advocacy.

item.title: Lightning Fast Testing for Salesforce with Applitools and TestZeus
item.description: This post looks at how TestZeus, a test automation library for Salesforce apps, and Applitools Visual AI can provide us with an optimized way to automate our customer scenarios by writing less code.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Meta Open Source: 2022 Year in Review
item.description: This post explores highlights from Meta Open Source and how Meta helped to build open source community in 2022.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I’m 5: MMF
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry explains MMF, Meta AI’s go-to deep learning framework for vision and language multimodal research.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Adding WhatsApp to Your Java Projects
item.description: This article describes how you can integrate the Cloud API, hosted by Meta, Meta’s integration of the WhatsApp Business Platform, into a Java application to enable sending and managing WhatsApp messages.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Fixing broken windows: How to deal with legacy systems
item.description: Working with old code? Here’s everything you need to know about managing and improving legacy systems.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Sending Messages via WhatsApp in Your Node.js Application
item.description: This article describes how you can integrate the Cloud API, hosted by Meta, into a Node.js application to enable sending and managing WhatsApp messages.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Sending Messages with WhatsApp in Your Python Applications
item.description: This article describes how you can integrate the Cloud API, hosted by Meta, Meta’s integration of the WhatsApp Business Platform, into a Python application to enable sending and managing WhatsApp messages.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Building End-to-End Experiences with the WhatsApp Business Platform
item.description: In this webinar you’ll learn to see how quickly you can get started with the WhatsApp Business Platform Cloud API.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I’m 5: Haxl
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry explains Haxl, a Haskell library for efficient data access ranging from databases to web-based services.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I’m 5: CacheLib
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains CacheLib, an open source, pluggable in-process caching engine.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: The 10,000 Steps of Open Source Project Health: Dmitry Vinnik [Testμ 2022]
item.description: The session starts with Dmitry explaining what open-source is. It is a process of making technology available for other folks to use and improve.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Sending WhatsApp Media Messages From An App
item.description: We’ll use this basic skeleton Node.js and Express.js server along with the necessary dependencies and skeleton functions already created.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Meet the Developers: Mobile Edition (Vadims Savjolovs)
item.description: For today`s interview, we have Vadims Savjolovs, a software engineer on the WhatsApp Commerce Team at Meta
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Managing Message Templates with the WhatsApp Business Platform
item.description: This hands-on tutorial will walk you through the processes of template management — including creation, deletion, and customization.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Meet the Developers: Mobile Edition (Pritesh Nandgaonkar)
item.description: For today’s interview, we have Pritesh Nandgaonkar, who works on the WhatsApp Apple Companion Team
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Implementing Webhooks From The WhatsApp Business Platform
item.description: In this article, we’ll walk through a tutorial that demonstrates how to set up an application that receives messages and stores them in a database.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Meet the Developers: Mobile Edition (Derick Zhang)
item.description: For today`s interview, we have Derick Zhang, a software engineer at Meta, working on the Remote Presence Co-Experience Team.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Meet the Developers: Mobile Edition (Aleksandr Sergeev)
item.description: For today`s interview, we have Aleksandr Sergeev, a software engineer on the Facebook iOS Reliability Team
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I’m 5: PPL Bench
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry explains PPL Bench, an evaluation framework for probabilistic programming languages.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: How to Visually Test a Remix App with Applitools and Cypress
item.description: In this blog post, we answer a single question: how to best visually test a Remix-based app? We walk through Remix and build a demo app to best showcase the framework.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I’m 5: Create React App
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains Create React App, an open source project that lets you set up a React web app by running just one command.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I’m 5: Glean
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains Glean, an open source system for collecting, deriving and querying facts about source code.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I’m 5: Bean Machine
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains Bean Machine, a universal probabilistic programming language that enables fast and accurate Bayesian analysis.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I’m 5: ComponentKit for UI Code Generation on iOS
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains ComponentKit, a declarative UI framework for iOS.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: React DevTools
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains React DevTools, browser extensions for Meta’s open source JavaScript library for UI.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: Stetho
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains Stetho, a debug bridge for Android applications.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: Recoil
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains Recoil, an experimental state management library for React apps.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Open Source Year in Review: 2021
item.description: A look back at some of our biggest open source releases and projects from 2021, with 837 active public projects and 231 new launches.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: Relay
item.description: In this video, Meta Open Source Developer Advocate Dimitri Vinnik, explains Relay, Meta’s GraphQL client built to scale.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: Spectrum - Towards Better Mobile Image Production
item.description: In this blog post, we explore a popular open source project called Spectrum, a cross-platform image processing library.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: Open Source
item.description: In this blog post, we give a brief overview of what open source is, and why companies engage in it.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: Metro - JavaScript Bundler for React Native
item.description: This blog post explores an open source project called Metro that acts as the JavaScript bundler for React Native.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: IGListKit - Building Flexible Collection Views for iOS
item.description: This blog post covers a popular open source project called IGListKit, a data-driven UICollectionView framework for building fast and flexible lists in iOS.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: React
item.description: In this video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry explains React, Facebook’s open-source JavaScript library used for building interactive user interfaces on websites or apps.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: "Explain Like I`m 5" Series: Season 3 Launch
item.description: In this video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry announces the third season of our short-format video series, Explain Like I’m 5 (ELI5).
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: CacheLib, Facebook`s open source caching engine for web-scale services
item.description: CacheLib is a pluggable in-process caching engine to build and scale high-performance services collaboratively.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: "Explain Like I`m 5" Series: Season 2 Wrap-up
item.description: In this video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik announces ending of the second season of our short-format video series, Explain Like I’m 5 (ELI5).
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: Magma
item.description: In this video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry explains the open source Magma
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: Spectrum
item.description: In this video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry explains the open source project Spectrum.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: IGListKit
item.description: In this video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry explains the open source project IGListKit.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: Metro
item.description: In this video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry explains the open source project Metro in a little over a minute.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: Flipper - Cross-Platform Debugger
item.description: In this blog post, we briefly look at a popular open source project called Flipper, an extensible mobile app debugger for iOS, Android and React Native.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: Folly - Battle-Tested C++ Library
item.description: In this blog post, we explore a popular open source project called Folly, a C++ library that provides core components used extensively at Meta.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: Ent - Schema as Code in Go
item.description: In this post, we take a closer look at an open source project called Ent, an entity framework for Go
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: Infer - Finding Bugs Before You Ship
item.description: In this post, we take a closer look at Infer, a static analysis tool for programming languages like Java and C.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: Folly
item.description: In this short video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Vinnik explains the open source project Folly, an open-source C++ library developed and used at Facebook.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: MLH Fellowship x Facebook Open Source Q&A
item.description: In this video, Open Source and Developer Advocate experts answer the questions of fellows from the MLH Fellowship Spring 2021 season of the program.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: ELI5: Buck - Modular Build System
item.description: In this post, we explain Buck, a high-performance build tool, in a way that is super simple to understand (or as it`s commonly known online, ELI5).
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Announcing Season 2 of “Explain Like I’m 5” Series
item.description: Since October 2020, the Facebook Open Source team has been publishing a series of short videos ELI5.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)

item.title: Explain Like I`m 5: Open Source
item.description: In this video, Facebook Open Source Developer Advocate Dmitry Open Source in a way that is easy to understand.
item.author: dmitry@dvinnik.dev (Dmitry Vinnik)
